event_label: 2024-11-21 Adani Group companies stock prices fell @Bombay Stock Exchange
subject: Shares of Adani Group companies
original_text: Shares of Adani Group companies suffered losses of up to 20% on Thursday morning after the conglomerate's chairperson Gautam Adani was indicted in the United States for his alleged role in a multibillion-dollar bribery and fraud scheme.

origin.title: Adani Group stocks fall by up to 20%

event_label: 2024-11-21 Adani Group companies stock prices fell @Bombay Stock Exchange
subject: the shares of Adani Enterprises
original_text: At 11.40 am, the shares of the group's flagship company Adani Enterprises fell by 20.61% on the Bombay Stock Exchange and was trading at Rs 2,238.95.

origin.title: Adani Group stocks fall by up to 20%

subject: Stock markets as a whole
object: BSE Sensex down 0.63% to 77,099.13, NSE Nifty down 0.74% to 23,344.55
original_text: Stock markets as a whole also suffered losses, with the benchmark BSE Sensex down by 0.63% at 77,099.13, and the NSE Nifty down by 0.74% at 23,344.55.

origin.title: Adani Group stocks fall by up to 20%

event_label: undated US prosecutors indicted Gautam Adani for bribery and fraud
subject: the Adani Group
original_text: In the wake of indictments of Gautam Adani and his nephew Sagar Adani in the United States, the Adani Group cancelled its bond offering of $600 million, or Rs 5,066.5 crore, The Indian Express reported.

origin.title: Adani Group stocks fall by up to 20%
